panelCard.lipSyncMayTakeMinutes: This may take a few minutes
panelCard.batchModeDesc: Offline inference, 50% cheaper, completes within 24 hours

summary.matched: This panel matched screenplay speech lines, and generation follows those speech constraints.
summary.matchedAudioDisabled: This panel matched screenplay speech lines, but audio is disabled for this generation, so it executes under silent constraints.
summary.fallback: No explicit speech-line mapping matched, so this panel is using panel-text fallback matching.
summary.fallbackAudioDisabled: Only panel-text fallback matching hit for this panel, but audio is disabled, so it executes under silent constraints.
summary.none: This panel did not match any speech contract and will be treated as silent.
summary.noneAudioDisabled: This panel did not match any speech contract, and audio is disabled, so it executes under silent constraints.

guardrail.non_verbal_only: Keep generated audio non-verbal only, such as ambience or movement.
guardrail.no_verbal_audio: Do not generate dialogue, narration, lyrics, or other verbal audio.
guardrail.no_mouth_sync: Avoid visible lip-sync or speech-shaped mouth movement.
guardrail.intentional_silent: Treat this panel as intentionally non-speaking.
guardrail.voiceover_only: Matched lines should play as voiceover or off-screen narration only.
guardrail.no_onscreen_speech: Do not stage the matched words as on-screen mouth speech.
guardrail.reaction_over_speaking: Visible characters should read as acting, listening, or reacting silently.
guardrail.verbatim_only: Use only the matched structured lines as spoken words.
guardrail.no_extra_lines: Do not add paraphrases, extra narration, or invented lines.
guardrail.align_visible_speech: If a speaker is visible, mouth movement should align only to these words.

promptModal.title: Edit Shot #{number} Video Prompt
promptModal.tip: Tip: Video models don't recognize character names, use appearance descriptions like "young man with black hair and blue eyes" instead of "Victor"

toolbar.title: Video Generation
toolbar.batchConfigDesc: Choose model and parameters before generating all videos.

firstLastFrame.title: First/Last Frame Settings
firstLastFrame.firstFrameSource: Uses current image from shot {number} as the first frame source
firstLastFrame.lastFrameSourceLinked: Uses current image from shot {number} as the tail frame source
firstLastFrame.lastFrameSourceAvailable: Link shot {number}'s current image to use it as the tail frame source
firstLastFrame.tailFrameLinkedDescription: This panel generates from its own current image and ends on shot {number}'s current image.
firstLastFrame.tailFrameAvailableDescription: You can link shot {number}'s current image as this panel's tail frame.
firstLastFrame.noNextPanelDescription: No next panel is available, so this shot can only generate from its own current image.
firstLastFrame.noNextPanelSource: Tail frame source unavailable because there is no next panel
firstLastFrame.noTailFrameImage: Next panel has no current image yet

left.title: Media Library
left.description: Clips imported from the video stage will appear here

right.title: Properties
right.selectClipHint: Select a clip to view properties

timeline.emptyHint: Drag video clips from media library to here
